# www.cemrebridal.com robots.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap (auto-generated by Next.js)
Sitemap: https://www.cemrebridal.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin/private paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/static/
Disallow: /admin/

# Allow all images and public assets
Allow: /images/
Allow: /_next/image

# Crawl delay
Crawl-delay: 0
